executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: The autonomous-marketing-stack is currently red under independent verification: its runner bundle remains unhealthy and its momentum gate still reports no_recent_reddit_post plus flat primary-repo adoption.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Repair or redesign the marketing owner loop so it can clear its failing runner/momentum contract with fresh outcome-producing execution, then rerun independent verification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: The autonomous marketing stack is currently failing its full-contract health gate
findings.mechanism: The runner bundle remains ok=false and the marketing independent verifier fails closed on a live momentum gap: no recent Reddit post plus flat primary-repo adoption.
findings.root_cause: The marketing owner loop is still generating activity and shared artifacts, but not enough fresh execution or outcome movement to satisfy its own independent verification contract.
findings.recommended_fix: The marketing owner loop must either produce fresh verified distribution execution that clears the no_recent_reddit_post gate or explicitly redesign/retire that gate so the contract matches reality.

findings.title: Stale-green architecture signoff leakage existed and required a verifier-level downgrade path
findings.mechanism: Before this run's repair, agent_architecture_latest.{json,md} could stay green after downstream verification went red because the verifier only reported failure instead of invalidating the top-level artifact.
findings.root_cause: Top-level architecture reporting depended on scheduled/manual refresh rather than deterministic verifier-driven invalidation.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the new verifier invalidation path in place and re-verify it after future verifier changes.

findings.title: Loop-integrity had been conflating watchdog fail-closed reporting with watchdog breakage
findings.mechanism: loop_integrity_audit.py previously required a pass phrase unconditionally, so a legitimate red verifier artifact was misclassified as a loop-integrity contract error instead of a correct watchdog report of a live blocker.
findings.root_cause: Loop-integrity mixed up loop-contract health with the domain state being reported by the watchdog.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the patched distinction between fail-closed watchdog reporting and actual loop-integrity contract failure, and independently verify it after future changes.

findings.title: Persisted disabled cron history still exists and must remain separated from live topology claims
findings.mechanism: jobs.json contains three disabled historical jobs while live Gateway cron currently shows 20 enabled jobs and 0 live-disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical retention is intentional, but any watchdog that collapses persisted history into live topology would leak stale/retired structure back into runtime judgment.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep live topology checks bound to openclaw cron list --json and report persisted disabled history only in separate persisted-history fields.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Repair or redesign the marketing full-contract gate so it reflects a real, current recovery path
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: The live red blocker is the marketing stack: runner ok=false, momentum needs_attention, and independent verification fail.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: The system regains a trustworthy independent pass/fail boundary for its highest-noise owner loop.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep the verifier-driven architecture invalidation path under independent verification
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This run repaired stale-green signoff leakage by making the verifier actively downgrade the top-level architecture artifact.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Top-level architecture status will stop overstating health after downstream verification turns red.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Preserve the loop-integrity distinction between correct fail-closed reporting and actual watchdog breakage
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This run exposed and patched a false self-failure path inside loop-integrity.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture coverage checks stay strict without penalizing watchdogs for reporting real red states.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed health_monitor.py, agent_architecture_independent_verify.py, and agent_architecture_verifier.py so stale green architecture signoff was replaced by a fresh fail-closed red state tied to current marketing blockers.
Patched loop_integrity_audit.py so a watchdog verifier artifact that correctly reports an independently verified fail is not itself treated as a loop-integrity contract break.

Patched agent_architecture_verifier.py so a fresh verifier failure now downgrades agent_architecture_latest.{json,md} and records verifier_invalidation metadata instead of leaving the older top-level report untouched.

independent_verification.summary: Fresh independent verification still fails, but now for the correct remaining blocker set: the architecture watchdog and its invalidation path are functioning, while the marketing owner loop remains red.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: After the marketing owner loop repairs or redesigns its failing runner/momentum gate, fresh independent verification is still required before the architecture path can return to healthy.
After any future change to agent_architecture_verifier.py or loop_integrity_audit.py, rerun independent architecture verification before trusting green status.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: The marketing owner loop remains red even though its learning artifacts clearly identify the failing tactics
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: The system is still better at naming the bottleneck than at producing fresh outcome-moving execution that clears its own contract, so architecture health cannot recover yet.

architecture_verifier_errors: health monitor reports non-architecture live issues: system-health-monitor:live_error

errors: health monitor reports non-architecture live issues: system-health-monitor:live_error
